## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (typecheck + production build)
- [ ] No secrets committed (API keys, `.env`, `.vercel/`)
- [ ] BYOK / no-persistence model preserved (no DB, no server-side key storage, no telemetry)
- [ ] Docs updated if setup or behavior changed
- [ ] Focused — one logical change
